title: dianthus orientalis subsp. stenocalyx
intro: Dianthus orientalis subsp. stenocalyx, also known as the Chinese pink or oriental pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) that is native to China. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Dianthus orientalis subsp. stenocalyx include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea infusions and tinctures, can be made from its flowers, leaves, and stems to harness its medicinal properties.
